meta.name: syntax-reconstruction
meta.description: Training data for converting spoken/dictated text back into syntactically correct strings. Focus: punctuation, symbols, casing, spacing — not command recognition. Each entry: 'dictated' is what a transcription engine outputs, 'output' is the target string.
meta.task: Given the dictated text, reconstruct the exact syntactic string.
